channel.title: Stream on logycoconut`s blog
channel.description: Recent content in Stream on logycoconut`s blog

item.title: Java8 Stream多字段分组求和groupingBy
item.description: 对流中的数据进行分组求和 实例 Collectors.groupingBy 最重要的一个参数 Function<? super T,? extends K> classifier ，它代表了map的key List<String> items = Arrays.asList("apple", "apple", "banana", "apple", "orange", "banana", "papaya"); Map<String, Long> result = items .stream() .collect(Collectors.groupingBy(Function.identity(), Collectors.counting())); System.out.println(result); // 运行结果 {papaya=1, orange=1, banana=2, apple=3} 比
